innovation_1.name: 三层角信号分解与几何特征材质分类机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that traditional light field EPI assumptions systematically fail under specific complex scene conditions, rigorously defining these boundaries as a negative theoretical contribution.

innovation_2.name: 基于域平衡采样的统一双掩码光场深度估计架构
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a three-layer angular signal decomposition mechanism alongside a unified dual-mask depth estimation architecture utilizing domain-balanced sampling to resolve these theoretical limitations.

innovation_3.name: 光场EPI假设失效边界的系统性界定与负向理论贡献
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate that our theoretically grounded framework significantly outperforms existing methods in robust light field depth estimation across complex domains.
